data.name: Each upload represents a .apkg bundle pushed to this server. After processing, packages are extracted and synced to their target APT repositories.
data.value: Setiap unggahan mewakili bundel .apkg yang didorong ke server ini. Setelah diproses, paket akan diekstraksi dan disinkronkan ke repositori APT tujuan mereka.

data.name: Upload via CLI with apkg push or use the Web UI. Uploads must be published before they appear in repositories.
data.value: Unggah melalui CLI dengan apkg push atau gunakan Antarmuka Web. Unggahan harus diterbitkan sebelum muncul di repositori.
